accessibleHelpTextCollapsed.value: Show changes to alpha particle energy.

staticDescription.value: An energy versus distance graph shows alpha particles in a nuclear potential well and indicates their energy before and after decay.

beforeDecay.value: Before decay: Initial energy is {{position}} potential energy barrier height. Alpha particle escape distance is {{distance}}.

afterDecay.value: After decay: Final energy lower. Alpha particle escape distance is {{distance}}. Potential well deeper.

accessibleHelpText.value: Adjust initial energy for alpha particles in nucleus.

accessibleParagraph.value: Timeline in seconds shows when each {{isotope}} atom decayed relative to the half-life, {{hLifeTime}}.

accessibleHelpText.value: Adjust time for isotope A to undergo one half-life.
Show or hide time scale ranging from milliseconds to billions of years.
Choose an isotope to explore its decay.

accessibleHelpTextCollapsed.value: View numbers of protons and neutrons in current isotope.
Explore how mass number and charge are conserved in decay.

beforeDecay.value: {{parentIsotope}} decays to a product and another product.

afterDecay.value: {{parentIsotope}} decays to {{daughterIsotope}} and an alpha particle. Original mass, {{parentMass}} and product masses, {{daughterMass}} and 4. Original charge, {{parentCharge}} and product charges, {{daughterCharge}} and 2.

accessibleHelpText.value: Restart time just before last decay.
For closer observations play sim on slower speed.
